plan_adherence_notes: Execution did not follow the plan on this branch. Compared with the parent step commit `8924cdd8`, the branch diff only adds `.fleet/tasks/.../plan.json` and `.fleet/tasks/.../research.json`; there is no production-code or test diff. In the current tree, `backend/server.py:3574-3602` still materializes the EventTrade command before the active-market gate, never calls `preview_event_trade_position_net_change(...)`, and never raises the planned `400 position_limit_exceeded` ApiError before command creation. The helper introduced earlier at `backend/server.py:1226-1245` exists, but this branch does not wire it into `handle_event_trade(...)`, and `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` has no exact-cap or over-limit regression coverage for the new contract.
missed_questions: This execution subtask never produced its own `questions.json`; validation had to fall back to `.fleet/tasks/bayes-market-eu0-v2-execute-step-2/questions.json`.
reason: Reject because the requested refactor was not executed on this branch. `handle_event_trade(...)` still creates a command before checking market status and does not run the read-only preview or enforce the frozen `position_limit_exceeded` `400` contract before any EventTrade command/order/event/idempotency materialization. Existing targeted tests still pass with `python3 -m unittest discover -q -s tests -p 'test_bayes_market_api.py' -k ...`, but they only cover the preexisting idempotency/exposure helper behavior and there are no new regressions for the requested limit path.
